---
applyTo: "README.md,**/*.md"
---

When editing markdown in this repo:

- Keep docs concise, practical, and easy to skim.
- Prefer concrete commands and file paths over abstract guidance.
- Use repository-relative paths in prose and examples where possible.
- Call out intentional omissions such as ignored runtime state or tool-specific adaptations.
- Avoid turning stable reference docs into task logs.
